title: Protocol: SubscribeRequestParams, SubscribeInvoiceResult, SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED
description:
Add three missing protocol types to core/src/protocol.rs needed for the subscription payment flow.

What: add SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED error code, SubscribeRequestParams, SubscribeInvoiceResult structs.

Algorithm:
1. In rpc_errors, add: pub const SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED: i32 = -32010;
2. Add SubscribeRequestParams { duration_days: u32 } — client sends this with subscribe_request; duration_days=30 is the standard subscription period.
3. Add SubscribeInvoiceResult { invoice_id: String, address: String, amount_zatoshi: u64, expires_at: String } — relay returns this; address is a bech32m UA string; expires_at is SQLite datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.
4. Verify no collision with existing error codes (-32700, -32600, -32601, -32603, -32001, -32002, -32003, -32004).
5. Add serde derive on all new structs; follow existing naming patterns.

Defensive rules:
- expires_at in SubscribeInvoiceResult must be SQLite format (not RFC3339) per CLAUDE.md §9.
- No Debug on structs containing key material (none here — these are wire types).

Tests: unit test round-trip serialization of each new struct via serde_json.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-core passes; both new structs serialize/deserialize correctly
